reason: Acceptance requires plugin/script recognizer evidence on >=2 real RPG Maker MV/MZ titles, but the local research corpus exposes only one reachable real MV/MZ title: LustMemory.
needed: Provide or configure at least one additional real RPG Maker MV/MZ title with an accessible www/ tree so the recognizer can assert zero generic/deferred plugin/script buckets or an exact justified opaque-command set across >=2 titles.

evidence.command: find /scratch -maxdepth 5 -type d \( -name www -o -name data -o -name js \) 2>/dev/null | rg -i 'rpg|lust|memory|frontier|mv|mz|game' | head -300
